5f54bff87468.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
5f54bff87468.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
5f54bff87468.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

99306299c0f3.title: Build review volume — you lack statistical credibility
99306299c0f3.description: Only 9 Google reviews. A single bad review moves your average visibly. Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews.

ab0c45e1059d.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
ab0c45e1059d.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

13c5d883ad6d.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
13c5d883ad6d.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
13c5d883ad6d.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
